title: Monthly Claims Performance & Kargo Validation (V2)
description: Monthly Claims Performance & Kargo Validation — VP Summary Dashboard

options.content: Monthly Claims Performance — Dynamic Date Range

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('month', c.claim_date)::timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Claims Received" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: 100% of claims historically paid before Kargo validation

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('month', c.claim_date)::timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Would Have Paid" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Would Have Paid (Before Validation)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('month', c.claim_date)::timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Refutable Claims" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id))))) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('month', c.claim_date)::timestamp AS time, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(ABS(c.claim_amount))::numeric, 2), 0) AS "Avoidable Spend" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id))))) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('month', c.claim_date)::timestamp AS time, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(ABS(c.claim_amount))::numeric, 2), 0) AS "Actually Paid" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH cc AS (SELECT c.claim_date, c.claim_amount, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id))))) THEN true ELSE false END AS refutable FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK')) SELECT date_trunc('month', claim_date)::timestamp AS time, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(ABS(claim_amount)) FILTER(WHERE NOT refutable)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Legitimate (Should Pay)", COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(ABS(claim_amount)) FILTER(WHERE refutable)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Refutable (Should NOT Pay)" FROM cc GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: What We Paid vs. What We Should Have Paid

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id)))))) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0) AS "Claims Coverage" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK')

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(ABS(c.claim_amount)) FILTER(WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id)))))), 0) / NULLIF(SUM(ABS(c.claim_amount)), 0), 0) AS "Dollars Coverage" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK')

WITH cc AS (SELECT c.claim_date, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id))))) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS refutable FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK')) SELECT date_trunc('month', claim_date)::timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Claims Received", SUM(refutable) AS "Refutable (Kargo Match)" FROM cc GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH cc AS (SELECT c.*, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id))))) THEN true ELSE false END AS refutable FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK')) SELECT TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', claim_date), 'FMMonth YYYY') AS "Month", COUNT(*) AS "Claims", ROUND(SUM(ABS(claim_amount))::numeric, 0) AS "Paid", SUM(CASE WHEN refutable THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::text || ' (' || ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN refutable THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))::text || '%)' AS "Kargo Perfect Match", '$' || TO_CHAR(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(claim_amount)) FILTER(WHERE refutable), 0)::numeric, 0), 'FM999,999,999') || ' (' || ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(ABS(claim_amount)) FILTER(WHERE refutable), 0) / NULLIF(SUM(ABS(claim_amount)), 0))::text || '%)' AS "Avoidable Spend", SUM(CASE WHEN NOT refutable THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::text || ' / $' || TO_CHAR(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(claim_amount)) FILTER(WHERE NOT refutable), 0)::numeric, 0), 'FM999,999,999') AS "Truly Unverifiable" FROM cc GROUP BY date_trunc('month', claim_date) ORDER BY date_trunc('month', claim_date)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Claims with Evidence to Deny" FROM claim_details c WHERE c.claim_date >= date_trunc('month', now()) - interval '1 month' AND c.claim_date < date_trunc('month', now()) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id)))))

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(ABS(c.claim_amount))::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Missed Savings" FROM claim_details c WHERE c.claim_date >= date_trunc('month', now()) - interval '1 month' AND c.claim_date < date_trunc('month', now()) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id)))))

options.content:
💡 Key Takeaway

88–95% of claims are verifiably not shortages. Historically, these would have been paid in full.

Kargo gives us the evidence to stop paying invalid claims and recover $28K+ this month.

targets.rawSql: WITH lm AS (SELECT c.claim_amount, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND s.order_status = 'Perfect' AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id))))) THEN true ELSE false END AS refutable FROM claim_details c WHERE c.claim_date >= date_trunc('month', now()) - interval '1 month' AND c.claim_date < date_trunc('month', now()) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK')) SELECT '💰 Bottom Line: We paid $' || TO_CHAR(ROUND(SUM(ABS(claim_amount))::numeric, 0), 'FM999,999,999') || ' last month, but Kargo shows $' || TO_CHAR(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS(claim_amount)) FILTER(WHERE refutable), 0)::numeric, 0), 'FM999,999,999') || ' of that was avoidable — a verified opportunity to reduce cost.' AS "summary" FROM lm

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT scac FROM shipments WHERE scac IS NOT NULL ORDER BY scac
list.label: Carrier
list.name: carrier
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT scac FROM shipments WHERE scac IS NOT NULL ORDER BY scac

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT claim_type FROM claim_details WHERE claim_type IS NOT NULL AND claim_type NOT ILIKE '%missing%pro%' ORDER BY claim_type
list.label: Claim Type
list.name: claim_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT claim_type FROM claim_details WHERE claim_type IS NOT NULL AND claim_type NOT ILIKE '%missing%pro%' ORDER BY claim_type
